pages.text: Each biome grows its own signature &6poison plant&r and, somewhere else, the remedy that cures it. This cross-biome cure cycle is deliberate — it gives biomes things only they can make, which feeds trade and diplomacy between settlements.

Grind a poison plant at the Mortar and Pestle into a paste, coat a dart with it, and you have a poison dart. Thrown by hand it is weak and short-ranged; loaded into a &6blowgun&r it flies far, fast, and straight, consuming one dart per shot.
Each poison attacks a different body system, so each has a specific antidote from another biome's herb. Keep the right remedy close: it is the only thing that pulls that poison back out of a friend.
